heading: PROJECTS
description: This page contains some of my projects that I have worked on. You can find the source code and more details about each project by clicking on the project title. Feel free to explore and reach out if you have any questions or would like to collaborate on any of these projects!

projects.name: elixpo_chapter
projects.description: A Collaborative Repository focusing on Computer Science from all the aspects that it deserves attention from!

projects.name: CNN_Facecom_2
projects.description: Collaborative Repository for CNN Facial Classification and Gender Recognition

projects.name: jackeyBot
projects.description: A free text2image discord bot service on discord, implementing discord.js

projects.name: lixSearch
projects.description: Research Based Project on Crawlers and Rankers with a LLM Supported Native Search Engine

projects.name: terminal-ascii
projects.description: An Experimental Approach to Define and Display Media Files like Images and Videos as its Equivalent ANSI representation inside OS Terminal

projects.name: Image_Compression
projects.description: Research on various compression algorithms on BW, GRAY, RGB, RGBA encodings, and a custom encoder .lix was built
